Name: sapdme_tool
Title: Tool
ShortText: Perform production tool related operations such as tool usage logging, tool validation, tool loading and unloading
ChangeLog: [{"date":"15 Feb 2026","notes":"1) The endpoint /tool/v1/tools for retrieving tools has been deprecated. Please use new endpoint <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_tool_v2/resource>/tools <\/a>. 2) The endpoint /tool/v1/prtLoadValidation for retrieving tool validation result for loaded tools has been deprecated. Please use new endpoint <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_tool_v2/resource>/prtLoadValidation<\/a>. 3) The endpoint /tool/v1/tools/{prt}/routings for retrieving routings and routing steps has been deprecated. Please use new endpoint <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_tool_v2/resource>/tools/{prt}/routings<\/a>. 4) The endpoint /tool/v1/tools/status for updating tool status has been deprecated. Please use new endpoint <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_tool_v2/resource>/tools/status<\/a>.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"17 August 2025","notes":"Added 409 HTTP status code to POST/PUT requests of Tool API for resource conflict handling.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"24 Feb 2024","notes":"Added endpoints for CRUD, update tool status, reset tool usage, create tool usage logs, retrieve PRT assignments, retrieve routing information by PRT.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"02 Dec 2023","notes":"Added a new API to load tool; Added a new API to unload tool; Added a new API to retrieve loaded tools.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"12 Nov 2022","notes":"Minor documentation corrections/ updates","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"20 Aug 2022","notes":"Corrected URL for Developer Guide/ Prepare for API Integration","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"13th Nov 2021","notes":"First version","state":"Active","version":"v1"}]
